items.name: 大網本廟跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 浄土真宗の開祖・親鸞の孫にあたる如信の墓所とされる史跡

en.name_en: Site of the Ōami main mausoleum
en.description_en: A mausoleum site classified as a historic site among monuments. It is village-designated by Izumizaki Village, with designation dated 1976-06-22.

items.name: 踏瀬旧国道松並木
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 江戸時代の仙台道の松並木。白河藩主松平定信の在任中（1783-1812年）に植えられ、現在の大木は1885年頃のもの

en.name_en: Pine row of the old Fumase national highway
en.description_en: A row of pine trees classified as a natural monument. It is village-designated by Izumizaki Village, with designation dated 1976-06-22.

items.name: 昌建寺の梵鐘
items.description: 1714年に栃木県佐野の鋳物師・松本七左衛門吉久が作成した梵鐘

en.description_en: A temple bell (bonshō) classified as a craft object among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Izumizaki Village, with designation dated 1978-12-19.

items.name: 昌建寺のしだれ桜
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 曹洞宗大泉山昌建寺の境内にある樹齢約230年のしだれ桜

en.description_en: A weeping cherry (shidarezakura) tree classified as a natural monument. It is village-designated by Izumizaki Village, with designation dated 2007-01-24.

items.name: 常願寺のしだれ桜
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 天台宗太田山常願寺の境内にある樹齢約600年のしだれ桜2本

en.description_en: A weeping cherry (shidarezakura) tree classified as a natural monument. It is village-designated by Izumizaki Village, with designation dated 2007-01-24.

items.name: 烏峠稲荷神社本殿
items.description: 江戸時代の最古の社殿建物。白河藩主松平定信が再建

en.name_en: Main hall of Karasutōge Inari Shrine
en.description_en: A shrine main hall (honden) classified as a building among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Izumizaki Village, with designation dated 1976-06-22.

items.name: 雷峰右衛門の碑
items.description: 泉崎出身の江戸時代の相撲取りで、1806年に横綱雷電を破ったことを記念する石碑

en.description_en: A stone monument classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Izumizaki Village, with designation dated 2007-01-24.
